@@ -171,6 +173,15 @@ enum GatewayLaunchAgentManager {
         return nil
     }
 
+    private static func escapePlistValue(_ raw: String) -> String {
+        raw
+            .replacingOccurrences(of: "&", with: "&")
+            .replacingOccurrences(of: "<", with: "<")
+            .replacingOccurrences(of: ">", with: ">")
+            .replacingOccurrences(of: "\"", with: """)
+            .replacingOccurrences(of: "'", with: "'")
+    }
+

         let output: String
